generatedBy: Codex Paper-Bob seamless integrated side-lot crop pass
generatedFrom: local Downloads sources, supplied sprite package, cleaned route prop sheet, clean lot references, and generated seamless left/right Paper-Bob integrated side-lot source sheets
runtimeIntegration: Paper-Bob Phaser runtime lazy-loads Bob sprite sheets, intro art, route prop art, and an integrated track atlas whose side-lot segment sprites carry invisible mailbox, doorstep, and window scoring hitboxes.
